potential_missing.source_sentence: A person first enters the platform.
If the person enters as a patient, the patient dashboard is shown.
If the person enters as a government official, the government dashboard is shown for related work.

potential_hallucinations.requirement: The system shall check if a user's registration is completed before allowing them to sign in.
The system shall allow users to log out after they complete their tasks.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: After signing in, the person may enter as a patient, a health worker, or a government official.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall allow users to sign in and then select their user type (patient, health worker, or government official).

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall check if a user's registration is completed before allowing them to sign in.
hallucinations.reason: The source text does not mention that the system checks if a user's registration is completed; it only states that new users create an account and that uncompleted registrations end there.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall show health planning results to government officials.
ambiguities.reason: This requirement is not explicitly mentioned in the source text. The source text only mentions that health planning results are shown, but it does not specify who will see them.
